/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,librrm_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so -o librrm_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so CMakeFiles/rrm_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/rrm_msgs/msg/detail/command__type_support.c.o CMakeFiles/rrm_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/rrm_msgs/srv/detail/command__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/rrm/build/rrm_msgs:/opt/ros/humble/lib: librrm_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
